_comment: Folio legal docs manifest. App fetches this on launch to know latest version. Bump version + summary when ToS/Privacy changes.

terms.summary_zh: v2.5：新增「停權通知與申訴」段（DSA 對齊）、揭露 OAuth 識別碼雜湊保留機制（防止規避停權重複註冊、5 年）
terms.summary_en: v2.5: Added 'Suspension Notice & Appeal' section (DSA-aligned), disclosing OAuth identifier hash retention for ban-evasion prevention (5 years)

privacy.summary_zh: v2.5.2：§04 修正 — Firebase Analytics 不再接收性別、亦不再以帳號識別碼綁定；分析資料僅關聯裝置層級 App 實例 ID。對應 app 端移除 gender 上傳與 setUserId。
privacy.summary_en: v2.5.2: §04 corrected — Firebase Analytics no longer receives gender and is no longer bound by an account identifier; analytics data is associated only with the device-level App Instance ID. Matches app-side removal of gender upload and setUserId.
